webchem v1.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Get record details from U.S. EPA Substance Registry Servives (SRS)

Source: R/srs.R
srs_query.Rd

Get record details from SRS, see https://cdxnodengn.epa.gov/cdx-srs-rest/

srs_query(
  query,
  from = c("itn", "cas", "epaid", "tsn", "name"),
  verbose = getOption("verbose"),
  ...
)

Arguments

query

character; query ID.
from

character; type of query ID, e.g. 'itn' , 'cas', 'epaid', 'tsn', 'name'.
verbose

logical; should a verbose output be printed on the console?
...

not currently used.

Value

a list of lists (for each supplied query): a list of 22. subsKey, internalTrackingNumber, systematicName, epaIdentificationNumber, currentCasNumber, currentTaxonomicSerialNumber, epaName, substanceType, categoryClass, kingdomCode, iupacName, pubChemId, molecularWeight, molecularFormula, inchiNotation, smilesNotation, classifications, characteristics, synonyms, casNumbers, taxonomicSerialNumbers, relationships

Examples

# \donttest{
# might fail if API is not available
srs_query(query = '50-00-0', from = 'cas')

#> $`50-00-0`
#>   subsKey internalTrackingNumber systematicName epaIdentificationNumber
#> 1   49201                   1008   Formaldehyde                      NA
#>   currentCasNumber currentTaxonomicSerialNumber      epaName      substanceType
#> 1          50-00-0                           NA Formaldehyde Chemical Substance
#>         categoryClass kingdomCode    iupacName pubChemId molecularWeight
#> 1 Regulatory Category          NA Formaldehyde        NA           30.03
#>   molecularFormula     inchiNotation smilesNotation classifications
#> 1             CH2O 1S/CH2O/c1-2/h1H2             NA              NA
#>   characteristics
#> 1              NA
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             synonyms
#> 1 Formaldehyde, solution, flammable, Methanal, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, FORMALDEHYDE                            , Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde (solution), Formaldehyde, U122, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde (gas), Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde (Formalin), Formaldehyde, Methyl aldehyde, Formaldehyde, Formaldehyde, Chemical Identifier, 3, 3, 49883, PCS Parameter Code, 16, 813, ERNS Chemical Identifier, 3, 813, ERNS Chemical Identifier, 3, 71880, PCS Parameter Code, 16, 50000, TRIPS Chemical Identifier, 22, CNNOAA00000000037206, CAMEO Internal Identifier, 25, CNNOAA00000000037212, CAMEO Internal Identifier, 25, 00000250, 250, STORET Internal Sequence Number, STORET Internal Sequence Number, 7, 7, FORM, 50000, 43502, AIRS Pollutant Code, AIRS CAS Number, AIRS SAROAD Number, 12, 1, 18
#>   casNumbers taxonomicSerialNumbers relationships
#> 1       NULL                   NULL          NULL
#> 

### multiple inputs
casrn <- c('50-00-0', '67-64-1')
srs_query(query = casrn, from = 'cas')

#> $`50-00-0`
#>   subsKey internalTrackingNumber systematicName epaIdentificationNumber
#> 1   49201                   1008   Formaldehyde                      NA
#>   currentCasNumber currentTaxonomicSerialNumber      epaName      substanceType
#> 1          50-00-0                           NA Formaldehyde Chemical Substance
#>         categoryClass kingdomCode    iupacName pubChemId molecularWeight
#> 1 Regulatory Category          NA Formaldehyde        NA           30.03
#>   molecularFormula     inchiNotation smilesNotation classifications
#> 1             CH2O 1S/CH2O/c1-2/h1H2             NA              NA
#>   characteristics
#> 1              NA
#>
